2026-04-14T22:13:44.4236835Z [hash-debug] File content length: 27521 bytes
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4241065Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (6521 chars):
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4241703Z ---
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4242190Z description: |
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4242890Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4243870Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4288569Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4289453Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4290258Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4290748Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4290893Z on:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4291212Z   issues:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4291547Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4291923Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4292300Z     inputs:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4292633Z       issue_number:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4293248Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4294151Z         required: true
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4294536Z         type: string
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4294913Z   roles: all
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4295254Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4295472Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4295637Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4295868Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4296047Z network:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4296381Z   allowed:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4296715Z     - defaults
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4297076Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4297315Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4297469Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4297856Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4298290Z   add-labels:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4298629Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4298959Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4299314Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4299660Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4299983Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4300331Z   add-comment:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4300667Z     max: 2
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4300997Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4301351Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4301703Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4302052Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4302400Z   close-issue:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4302744Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4303069Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4303416Z   noop:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4303771Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4304352Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4304685Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4305634Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4306636Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4307099Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4307574Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4307948Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4308328Z       inputs:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4308662Z         message:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4309224Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4309872Z           required: true
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4310272Z           type: string
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4310651Z         owners:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4311461Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4312655Z           required: true
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4313062Z           type: string
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4313438Z       steps:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4314099Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4314589Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4315050Z           env:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4315597Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4316261Z           with:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4316622Z             script: |
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4317032Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4317583Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4317986Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4318182Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4318918Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4319628Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4320106Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4320617Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4321321Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4321864Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4322273Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4322646Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4323050Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4323254Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4323470Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4354501Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4355200Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4355562Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4355744Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4357117Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4358426Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4358823Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4359037Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4359239Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4359813Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4360355Z                 try {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4360793Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4361355Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4361917Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4362390Z                   });
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4362827Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4363398Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4383636Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4384987Z                   });
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4385410Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4386029Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4386651Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4387035Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4387499Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4387703Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4387885Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4388396Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4388945Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4389316Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4389703Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4390332Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4390929Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4391300Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4391498Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4391669Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4392417Z               try {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4393025Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4393752Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4415818Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4416527Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4416904Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4417114Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4417385Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4418055Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4418588Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4418966Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4419168Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4419529Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4420213Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4420811Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4421385Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4421766Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4421967Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4422151Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4422821Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4423648Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4424800Z                   return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4425203Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4425411Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4425605Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4426089Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4426546Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4427014Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4427445Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4427950Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4428543Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4429242Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4429899Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4430356Z                   })
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4430738Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4431026Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4431216Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4431817Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4432422Z                   return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4432799Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4433011Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4433183Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4433730Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4434476Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4434796Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4434949Z                 try {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4435400Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4435971Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4436482Z                     body
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4436852Z                   });
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4437516Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4438274Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4438907Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4439573Z                   return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4439951Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4440287Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4440507Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4440657Z tools:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4440982Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4441321Z   github:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4441666Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4442376Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4443089Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4443856Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4444649Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4444901Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4445069Z timeout-minutes: 10

2026-04-14T22:13:44.4466678Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"

2026-04-14T22:13:44.4476309Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4476951Z           with:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4477300Z             script: |
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4477685Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4478240Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4478638Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4478880Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4479578Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4480291Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4480768Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4481283Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4481978Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4482511Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4482929Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4483290Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4483685Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4483890Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4484262Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4484808Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4485329Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4485651Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4485831Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4487165Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4488468Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4488846Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4489041Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4489226Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4489793Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4490322Z                 try {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4490739Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4491304Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4491843Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4492329Z                   });
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4492772Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4493332Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4494614Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4495502Z                   });
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4495899Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4496522Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4497130Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4497505Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4497954Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4498153Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4498326Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4498850Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4499389Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4499754Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4500136Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4500756Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4501357Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4501725Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4501915Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4502081Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4502493Z               try {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4503160Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4503821Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4504716Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4505369Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4505737Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4505937Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4506204Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4506862Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4507416Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4507774Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4507983Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4508341Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4509034Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4509614Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4510209Z                 return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4510586Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4510785Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4510960Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4511638Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4512448Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4513040Z                   return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4513424Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4513631Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4513812Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4514464Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4514922Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4515373Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4515813Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4516299Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4516901Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4517583Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4518225Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4518694Z                   })
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4519078Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4519366Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4519550Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4520167Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4520780Z                   return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4521157Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4521362Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4521542Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4522082Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4522640Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4522939Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4523096Z                 try {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4523540Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4524255Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4524775Z                     body
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4525158Z                   });
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4525832Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4526599Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4527251Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4527919Z                   return;
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4528292Z                 }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4528637Z               }
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4528835Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4528990Z tools:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4529309Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4529647Z   github:
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4529977Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4530481Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4531293Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4531990Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4532678Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4532915Z 
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4533070Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4533631Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4534467Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-14T22:13:44.4567629Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
